auth.headline: Industrial operations, protected by tenant-aware access.
auth.demoHint: Use your organisation credentials. Local development can enable a seeded owner account through environment variables.
auth.error: Could not sign in with those credentials.
auth.tenantSafe: Organisation and plant context are resolved server-side.
auth.auditReady: Sensitive actions are designed for audit trails.
auth.localised: English, Hindi and Marathi are enabled.

dashboard.title: Owner operations dashboard
dashboard.aiSafetyText: AI recommendations are advisory. Stock, weighment, mix-design, payment, compliance and machine-control actions require human approval and audit.

masterData.title: Master data
masterData.subtitle: Manage customers, sites, suppliers, products, units, prices, vehicles, drivers, machines and storage locations with tenant-aware controls.
